<!--
🧭 This project is Spec-Driven (SDD) + Test-Driven (TDD). The checklist below is the
constitution's definition of done (.specify/constitution.md §1–§7). Tick what applies;
mark a box N/A only with a one-line reason.
-->

## 📝 Summary / Resumo

<!-- What changed and why. Link the spec for features: `specs/NNN-feature-name/`. -->

## 🧪 How tested / Como testei

<!-- Commands run + result. Paste the failing-test-first → green evidence where relevant. -->

## ✅ Definition of done / Definição de pronto

- [ ] **§1 — Spec linked for features** (spec vinculada — `specs/NNN-…`, ou N/A para bug/chore)
- [ ] **§2 — Failing test first, then green** (teste que falha antes, depois passa — red → green → refactor)
- [ ] **§3 — Gates green via `/verify-gates`** (gates verdes — lint · tests · build)
- [ ] **§4 — One source of truth; docs moved in this change** (fonte única; docs atualizados junto)
- [ ] **§5 — Honesty: nothing mocked passed off as real; misconfig fails fast** (nada falso como real; erro explícito)
- [ ] **§6 — Agent guidance in sync: `CLAUDE.md` ↔ `AGENTS.md`, `.claude` ↔ `.codex`** (guias de agente sincronizados)
- [ ] **§7 — Bilingual en/pt for new user-facing text** *(if applicable / se aplicável)*
